## Security checklist (if touching crypto / auth / IPC)

- [ ] No key material crosses the IPC boundary
- [ ] New key material uses `Zeroizing<>` wrapper
- [ ] Shell commands are validated / sanitized before execution
- [ ] No new `unwrap()` calls in error paths
